meta.source: Seeded from mbzuai-oryx/Awesome-LLM-Post-training; auto-updated daily via arXiv crawler.

papers.title: A Survey on Post-training of Large Language Models

summary.en: A comprehensive survey systematically organizing the landscape of LLM post-training methods, spanning fine-tuning, RLHF, and reasoning enhancement.
summary.zh: 系统梳理 LLM 后训练方法全景的综述,涵盖微调、RLHF 与推理增强等方向。

papers.title: LLM Post-Training: A Deep Dive into Reasoning Large Language Models

summary.en: The foundational survey behind this list, taxonomizing post-training into fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, and test-time scaling.
summary.zh: 本列表所依据的基础综述,将后训练划分为微调、强化学习与测试时扩展三大类。

papers.title: From System 1 to System 2: A Survey of Reasoning Large Language Models

summary.en: Surveys the transition from fast intuitive (System 1) to deliberate reasoning (System 2) capabilities in large language models.
summary.zh: 综述大语言模型从快速直觉 (System 1) 到审慎推理 (System 2) 能力的演进。

papers.title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

summary.en: The InstructGPT paper: aligns language models with human intent using RLHF, the blueprint for modern instruction-following models.
summary.zh: InstructGPT 论文:用 RLHF 将语言模型与人类意图对齐,是现代指令遵循模型的蓝本。

papers.title: DeepSeekMath: Pushing the Limits of Mathematical Reasoning in Open Language Models

summary.en: Introduces GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization) and demonstrates strong mathematical reasoning in open models.
summary.zh: 提出 GRPO(组相对策略优化),在开源模型上实现强大的数学推理能力。

papers.title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Shows that large-scale RL alone can incentivize strong reasoning, producing R1 with emergent chain-of-thought behavior.
summary.zh: 证明仅靠大规模强化学习即可激发强推理能力,训练出具备涌现思维链行为的 R1。

papers.title: Kimi k1.5: Scaling Reinforcement Learning with LLMs

summary.en: Describes scaling RL training with long-context and multimodal reasoning to reach frontier performance.
summary.zh: 介绍通过长上下文与多模态推理扩展 RL 训练,达到前沿性能。

papers.title: Let's Verify Step by Step

summary.en: Demonstrates that process supervision (rewarding each reasoning step) outperforms outcome supervision for math reasoning.
summary.zh: 证明过程监督(对每一步推理给予奖励)在数学推理上优于结果监督。

papers.title: Step-DPO: Step-wise Preference Optimization for Long-chain Reasoning of LLMs

summary.en: Extends DPO to operate at the level of individual reasoning steps for improved long-chain reasoning.
summary.zh: 将 DPO 扩展到单个推理步骤层面,以提升长链条推理能力。

papers.title: rStar-Math: Small LLMs Can Master Math Reasoning with Self-Evolved Deep Thinking

summary.en: Uses MCTS-driven self-evolution to let small models achieve strong math reasoning without distillation from larger models.
summary.zh: 借助 MCTS 驱动的自我进化,让小模型无需从大模型蒸馏即可获得强数学推理能力。

papers.title: Distilling System 2 into System 1

summary.en: Distills deliberate System 2 reasoning into faster System 1 responses, reducing inference cost while retaining quality.
summary.zh: 将审慎的 System 2 推理蒸馏为更快的 System 1 响应,在保持质量的同时降低推理成本。

papers.title: Humanity's Last Exam

summary.en: A frontier benchmark of extremely difficult, expert-level questions designed to resist saturation by current models.
summary.zh: 一个由极难的专家级题目组成的前沿基准,旨在抵抗当前模型的性能饱和。

papers.title: Safety Tax: Safety Alignment Makes Your Large Reasoning Models Less Reasonable

summary.en: Investigates the trade-off where safety alignment can degrade the reasoning ability of large reasoning models.
summary.zh: 研究安全对齐可能削弱大型推理模型推理能力的权衡关系。

papers.title: GuardReasoner: Towards Reasoning-based LLM Safeguards

summary.en: Proposes reasoning-based guardrails that improve the interpretability and robustness of LLM safety moderation.
summary.zh: 提出基于推理的护栏机制,提升 LLM 安全审核的可解释性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Squeeze the Soaked Sponge: Efficient Off-policy Reinforcement Finetuning for LLMs

summary.en: Proposes an efficient off-policy reinforcement fine-tuning method that better reuses collected experience.
summary.zh: 提出一种高效的离线策略强化微调方法,更充分地复用已采集的经验数据。

papers.title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for LLM Multi-Step Reasoning

summary.en: Applies offline RL to improve multi-step reasoning without costly online rollouts.
summary.zh: 将离线强化学习应用于多步推理,无需昂贵的在线采样。

papers.title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model

summary.en: Introduces DPO, which optimizes preferences directly with a simple classification loss, removing the need for a separate reward model and RL loop.
summary.zh: 提出 DPO,用简单的分类损失直接优化偏好,无需单独的奖励模型与强化学习循环。

papers.title: Preference Ranking Optimization for Human Alignment (PRO)

summary.en: Generalizes pairwise preference learning to ranked lists of responses for more efficient human alignment.
summary.zh: 将成对偏好学习推广到排序列表,以更高效地实现人类对齐。

papers.title: A General Theoretical Paradigm to Understand Learning from Human Preferences (IPO)

summary.en: Proposes IPO, a theoretically grounded objective that avoids the overfitting DPO can suffer when preferences are near-deterministic.
summary.zh: 提出 IPO,一种有理论支撑的目标函数,可避免偏好接近确定时 DPO 易出现的过拟合。

papers.title: KTO: Model Alignment as Prospect Theoretic Optimization

summary.en: Aligns models using only binary good/bad signals per output, drawing on prospect theory and removing the need for paired preferences.
summary.zh: 基于前景理论,仅用每条输出的好/坏二元信号进行对齐,无需成对偏好数据。

papers.title: SimPO: Simple Preference Optimization with a Reference-Free Reward

summary.en: Simplifies DPO by using the average log-probability as an implicit reward, eliminating the reference model.
summary.zh: 用平均对数概率作为隐式奖励来简化 DPO,去除了参考模型。

papers.title: ORPO: Monolithic Preference Optimization without Reference Model

summary.en: Combines supervised fine-tuning and preference alignment into a single stage with an odds-ratio penalty, no reference model needed.
summary.zh: 用几率比惩罚将监督微调与偏好对齐合并为单一阶段,无需参考模型。

papers.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models

summary.en: Freezes pretrained weights and injects trainable low-rank matrices, drastically cutting the cost of fine-tuning large models.
summary.zh: 冻结预训练权重并注入可训练的低秩矩阵,大幅降低大模型微调成本。

papers.title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs

summary.en: Enables fine-tuning of large models on a single GPU by back-propagating through 4-bit quantized weights into LoRA adapters.
summary.zh: 通过在 4-bit 量化权重上反向传播到 LoRA 适配器,使大模型可在单张 GPU 上微调。

papers.title: Self-Instruct: Aligning Language Models with Self-Generated Instructions

summary.en: Bootstraps an instruction-following dataset from a model's own generations, reducing reliance on human-written instructions.
summary.zh: 利用模型自身生成来自举指令数据集,降低对人工编写指令的依赖。

papers.title: Self-Consistency Improves Chain of Thought Reasoning in Language Models

summary.en: Samples multiple reasoning paths and takes a majority vote over answers, substantially improving chain-of-thought accuracy.
summary.zh: 采样多条推理路径并对答案取多数投票,显著提升思维链的准确率。

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models

summary.en: Shows that prompting models to produce intermediate reasoning steps unlocks strong performance on complex reasoning tasks.
summary.zh: 证明引导模型输出中间推理步骤可在复杂推理任务上释放强大性能。

papers.title: Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models

summary.en: Generalizes chain-of-thought into a search over a tree of intermediate thoughts with lookahead and backtracking.
summary.zh: 将思维链推广为在思维树上的搜索,支持前瞻与回溯。

papers.title: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute Optimally can be More Effective than Scaling Model Parameters

summary.en: Shows that allocating more inference-time compute can outperform simply using a larger model, given an optimal strategy.
summary.zh: 证明在最优策略下,增加推理时算力可胜过单纯使用更大的模型。

papers.title: Learning to Summarize from Human Feedback

summary.en: An early demonstration that training a reward model on human comparisons and optimizing with RL beats supervised summarization.
summary.zh: 早期工作,证明在人类比较上训练奖励模型并用 RL 优化,效果优于监督式摘要。

papers.title: Training a Helpful and Harmless Assistant with RLHF

summary.en: Anthropic's study of RLHF for helpfulness and harmlessness, including preference data collection and reward model scaling.
summary.zh: Anthropic 关于以有用性与无害性为目标的 RLHF 研究,涵盖偏好数据收集与奖励模型扩展。

papers.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback

summary.en: Replaces human harmlessness labels with AI feedback guided by a set of principles (a 'constitution'), enabling RLAIF.
summary.zh: 用受一组原则(“宪法”)引导的 AI 反馈替代人工无害性标注,实现 RLAIF。

papers.title: STaR: Bootstrapping Reasoning with Reasoning

summary.en: Iteratively fine-tunes a model on its own correct rationales, bootstrapping reasoning ability from a small seed set.
summary.zh: 在模型自身生成的正确推理过程上迭代微调,从少量种子样本自举出推理能力。

papers.title: Training Verifiers to Solve Math Word Problems (GSM8K)

summary.en: Introduces the GSM8K grade-school math benchmark and shows verifiers can rerank solutions for large accuracy gains.
summary.zh: 提出 GSM8K 小学数学基准,并证明验证器可对候选解重排以大幅提升准确率。

papers.title: TRL: Transformer Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Hugging Face's library for post-training transformers with SFT, reward modeling, PPO, DPO, and GRPO.
summary.zh: Hugging Face 的后训练库,支持 SFT、奖励建模、PPO、DPO 与 GRPO。

papers.title: OpenRLHF: An Easy-to-use, Scalable and High-performance RLHF Framework

summary.en: A scalable RLHF framework built on Ray, vLLM, and DeepSpeed for training large models with PPO and related algorithms.
summary.zh: 基于 Ray、vLLM 与 DeepSpeed 的可扩展 RLHF 框架,用于以 PPO 等算法训练大模型。

papers.title: verl: Volcano Engine Reinforcement Learning for LLMs

summary.en: A flexible, efficient RL training library for LLMs implementing the HybridFlow programming model.
summary.zh: 面向 LLM 的灵活高效 RL 训练库,实现了 HybridFlow 编程模型。
